steps.title: Identify the comparison metric
steps.content: The question asks how the UK's decline compares across nations. The table provides percent change values—this metric fairly compares declines across countries with different baseline hours.

steps.title: Match the percent change data to the choices
steps.content: UK's percent decrease is 24%, compared to Germany (44%), Australia (21%), and Mexico (7%). Choice B states UK was less than Germany but greater than both Australia and Mexico—exactly matching the data. The other choices reverse comparisons, switch to absolute hours, or incorrectly claim UK rose instead of declined. That matches choice B — B is correct.
